name: Creamy Mushroom Barley Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water and beef bouillon granules in a large Dutch oven. Bring to a boil.
2. Add barley and return to boil.
3. Cover, reduce heat, and simmer 1 hour or until tender. Remove half of the cooked barley using a slotted spoon; set both mixtures aside.
4. Coat a medium skillet with cooking spray; add oil and place over medium heat until hot. Add onion and garlic and sauté for 2 minutes.
5. Add mushrooms and vermouth; cook an additional 2 minutes, stirring frequently. Cover, reduce heat, and simmer for 5 minutes. Remove from heat.
6. In a food processor, combine the remaining barley, mushroom mixture, and milk. Process until smooth.
7. Add the pureed barley mixture and remaining mushroom mixture to the Dutch oven. Bring to a boil. Remove from heat and stir in the remaining ingredients. Serve warm.
